overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban plaza. The player emerges from under a concrete overpass into a sunlit pedestrian area with benches, trees, and graffiti, then continues through a crowded plaza with a large orange billboard structure before entering a covered walkway under a highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open pedestrian plaza

events.description: exits the shadow of the concrete overpass into bright sunlight
lighting shifts from artificial shade to natural direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward under the overpass and emerging into the open plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing red eyes walking toward camera

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with orange support beams
tall building with red signage visible in distance
dark colored car parked near the overpass
large beige concrete commercial building with multiple levels

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass with orange support beams. The camera moves forward from the shadowed shelter into bright sunlight, emerging into an open pedestrian plaza. A distinctive pedestrian with glowing red eyes approaches from the center before the camera continues into the sunlit area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with benches and planters

agents.ego_description: walking through the sunlit plaza passing benches and planter boxes with trees

entered.detail: large rectangular planters containing mature trees
yellow and green benches with seated pedestrians
colorful spray paint art on the ground surface
tall pole with angular light fixture
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking through a wide-open pedestrian plaza bathed in bright sunlight. The area features large concrete planters with mature trees, colorful graffiti on the pavement, and benches where people are seated. Futuristic street lamps and digital billboards line the walkway as the camera moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: central plaza with large advertising structure and pedestrian crossing

events.description: turns left to cross the pedestrian street with yellow markings

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large billboard structure then turning left to cross a marked pedestrian area

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in cowboy hat and vest walking past camera

entered.detail: large distinctive orange advertising tower with multiple screens
tall palm trees lining the plaza
yellow striped crosswalk markings on the ground

segments.scene_description: Approaching a prominent orange billboard structure in the central plaza. The camera continues forward then turns left to cross a pedestrian area marked with yellow lines. A pedestrian wearing a cowboy hat passes by closely as the camera moves toward a covered walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under highway overpass

events.description: enters the covered walkway beneath the highway overpass
lighting shifts from bright sunlight to dimmer artificial fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded covered walkway beneath the highway with many pedestrians passing by

entered.detail: concrete underside of the highway with visible structural beams
long rows of overhead fluorescent light fixtures
thick support columns for the overpass structure
mechanical escalator visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered pedestrian walkway beneath a massive highway overpass. The environment shifts from bright sunlight to dimmer artificial lighting provided by linear fluorescent fixtures. The walkway is crowded with pedestrians moving in both directions, and thick concrete support pillars line the path. An escalator structure is visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadows of a concrete overpass into a vibrant, sunlit urban plaza before descending back into a dim, covered walkway. It begins beneath a massive highway structure with orange support beams, moving forward from the shade into bright sunlight as a pedestrian with glowing red eyes passes by. As the camera enters the open plaza, the environment expands into a wide pedestrian area filled with mature trees in concrete planters, colorful pavement graffiti, and digital billboards. The scene then shifts toward a prominent orange billboard structure, turning left across yellow-marked pedestrian lines and past a figure in a cowboy hat. Finally, the camera moves from the brilliance of the open air into a covered walkway beneath another highway overpass, where the lighting transitions to dim fluorescent fixtures amidst a crowd of pedestrians and thick concrete pillars.
